description_long: This is a robust adult male figure dressed in rugged, fantasy-inspired armor with asymmetrical shoulder pads and reinforced bracers. The character has a muscular build, a prominent beard, and a distinctive mohawk hairstyle with shaved sides featuring intricate patterns. His attire includes a belted tunic, layered leather armor, and heavy boots with fur trim, suggesting a warrior or adventurer archetype. The left shoulder is protected by a large, spiked pauldron, while the right is covered by a smaller, rounded guard. Accessories such as straps, buckles, and a cross-body harness add to the utilitarian and battle-ready appearance. The overall look is detailed and stylized, suitable for a fantasy or post-apocalyptic urban setting.
description: A muscular adult male in detailed, rugged armor with a mohawk and beard, featuring asymmetrical shoulder pads and heavy boots. The character exudes a warrior or adventurer vibe with layered leather and metal accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full facial features, mohawk, beard, and the asymmetrical armor with a large left shoulder pad and cross-body harness.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the shaved head pattern, the large spiked pauldron, and the layered armor on the arm and leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the tunic, the cross-body strap, and the fur-trimmed boots, with both shoulder guards visible.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the smaller rounded shoulder guard, the bracer details, and the profile of the mohawk and beard.
attribute_clothing_type: armored tunic with asymmetrical shoulder pads, reinforced bracers, cross-body harness, and heavy boots
attribute_hairstyle: short mohawk with shaved patterned sides and full beard
